notes: Flagpole insert with wipeouts and rectangular base framing on layer 0

Twenty LINEs on layer 0 form a wide thin rectangular plinth/frame (bbox ~1220×126), not furniture or dimension geometry. Parallel horizontals exist but sit with the flagpole base rather than a wall-layer stack.
rationale.rule: When an anonymous block’s dominant semantic cue is a named nested symbol (here a flagpole) with wipeout masking and framing lines on layer 0, classify as 심볼 and keep wall_likelihood low unless wall-named layers or clear wall-thickness pairs dominate.
rationale.counterfactual: If the flagpole INSERT and wipeouts were absent and lines lived on a wall/INSUL layer with consistent cavity thickness, judgment would flip toward 평면 부분도 with higher wall_likelihood. Presence of DIMENSION/text-only content would push toward 치수캐시.
rationale.uncertainty: Projection lacks vertex styling of the nested flagpole and true layer meanings beyond names, so whether the outer frame is a curb, podium, or incidental clip boundary cannot be confirmed.
